description: A coaching and self-development platform with two applications: (1) Desktop/Web app for Superadmin, Admin, and Mentor management, (2) Mobile PWA for Mentees with simplified daily exercise tracking, calendar views, and reminder notifications.

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js Project with TypeScript
userStories.description: Set up Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript strict mode, ESLint, Prettier, and Tailwind CSS. Configure project structure following Cerebro patterns.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Tailwind CSS configured with Twilight Studio theme colors
npm run dev starts without errors

userStories.title: Set Up PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
userStories.description: Configure PostgreSQL database connection and Drizzle ORM. Use docker-compose for local PostgreSQL. Create initial schema.

userStories.title: Verify Keycloak Realm Bootstrap Script
userStories.description: VERIFICATION ONLY: Verify that bootstrap-keycloak.sh script already exists and is properly configured. The script is already created - just verify it has correct configuration. DO NOT modify or execute the script.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Redirect URIs configured for both dev and prod
Roles created: superadmin, admin, mentor, mentee
acceptanceCriteria.testCommand: grep -q "superadmin" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh && grep -q "admin" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh && grep -q "mentor" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh && grep -q "mentee" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh

acceptanceCriteria.text: Test users created for each role
acceptanceCriteria.testCommand: grep -q "testsuperadmin" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh && grep -q "testadmin" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh && grep -q "testmentor" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh && grep -q "testmentee" scripts/bootstrap-keycloak.sh

acceptanceCriteria.text: Environment variables updated with Keycloak config

userStories.title: Integrate Keycloak Authentication
userStories.description: Set up Keycloak integration using next-auth. Implement login/logout flows, JWT validation, and role-based middleware for all four roles.

acceptanceCriteria.text: User info available in React context

userStories.title: Set Up tRPC with Type-Safe API
userStories.description: Configure tRPC for type-safe API communication. Create base routers. Integrate with TanStack Query.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Base routers created (tenants, users, classes, exercises)
tRPC client with TanStack Query hooks

userStories.title: Install and Configure shadcn/ui Components
userStories.description: Set up shadcn/ui component library with Twilight Studio theme. Install core components.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Core components installed (Button, Card, Dialog, Input, Select, Table, Tabs, Calendar)

userStories.title: Create Tenant Database Schema
userStories.description: Implement tenants table for multi-tenancy. Each tenant represents an organization using the platform.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Tenants table with id, name, slug, settings
All other tables include tenant_id foreign key

userStories.title: Create User Database Schema
userStories.description: Implement users table with role enum (superadmin, admin, mentor, mentee), tenant association, and profile fields.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Users table with all required fields

userStories.title: Build Superadmin Tenant Management
userStories.description: Create superadmin-only interface for creating and managing tenants.

userStories.title: Build Admin User Management Page
userStories.description: Create admin interface for managing users within their tenant. Admins manage mentors and mentees.

userStories.title: Implement Invitation System
userStories.description: Create invitation system for onboarding new users. Support email invitations with role pre-assignment.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Create invitation with role and expiry
Invitation status tracking (pending, accepted, expired, revoked)

userStories.title: Build Admin View Switcher
userStories.description: Allow admins to switch view to Mentor or Mentee perspective. Superadmins can also switch to Admin view.

acceptanceCriteria.text: UI adapts based on selected view

userStories.title: Create Schwerpunktebenen Schema and CRUD
userStories.description: Implement focus areas (Schwerpunktebenen) table. These are monthly themes in the 3-month program cycle.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Fields: title, description, herkunft, ziel (all bilingual)

userStories.title: Create Weeks Schema and CRUD
userStories.description: Implement weeks table belonging to Schwerpunktebenen. Each phase has ~3 weeks.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Weeks table with foreign key to schwerpunktebenen

userStories.title: Create Exercises Schema and CRUD
userStories.description: Implement exercises table with support for video, audio, and text content. This is the content library.

userStories.title: Build Week-Exercise Relationships
userStories.description: Create weekExercises junction table linking weeks to exercises with ordering and frequency.

acceptanceCriteria.text: API to add/remove exercises from weeks

userStories.title: Build Curriculum Builder UI
userStories.description: Create visual curriculum builder for admins to structure the 3-month program: Schwerpunktebenen > Weeks > Exercises.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Preview mode showing full program flow
Bilingual content entry with AI translation

userStories.title: Create Classes Schema
userStories.description: Implement classes table with mentor assignment and duration settings.

userStories.title: Create Class Members Schema
userStories.description: Implement classMembers junction table for mentee enrollment with payment tracking.

acceptanceCriteria.text: classMembers table with user/class foreign keys

userStories.title: Implement Class Curriculum Assignment
userStories.description: Link schwerpunktebenen to classes by month. This assigns the curriculum template to a class.

acceptanceCriteria.text: classCurriculum table linking classes to schwerpunktebenen
Mentor can customize curriculum per class

userStories.title: Build Superadmin Dashboard
userStories.description: Create superadmin dashboard showing all tenants and system-wide statistics. Desktop only.

userStories.title: Build Admin Dashboard
userStories.description: Create admin dashboard showing tenant overview statistics. Desktop only.

userStories.title: Build Admin Class Management
userStories.description: Create class listing and detail pages for admin management. Desktop only.

userStories.title: Build Admin Analytics Page
userStories.description: Create analytics dashboard for admins showing tenant-wide metrics. Desktop only.

userStories.title: Create Scheduled Exercises Schema
userStories.description: Implement scheduledExercises table for tracking mentee exercise occurrences.

userStories.title: Create Weekly Recurring Exercises Schema
userStories.description: Implement recurring exercise patterns for daily routines.

userStories.title: Build Mobile App Shell and Navigation
userStories.description: Create the mobile PWA shell with bottom navigation for mentor and mentee views.

userStories.title: Build Mentor Mobile Dashboard
userStories.description: Create mobile dashboard for mentors showing classes and upcoming sessions.

acceptanceCriteria.text: My classes list with mentee counts

userStories.title: Build Mentor Mobile Calendar
userStories.description: Create mobile calendar for mentors to view and manage sessions.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Monthly calendar view optimized for mobile
Tap day to see session list

userStories.title: Build Mentor Mobile Availability Management
userStories.description: Allow mentors to set and manage availability slots from mobile.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Bulk add slots for recurring times

userStories.title: Build Mentor Mobile Class View
userStories.description: Create mobile view for mentors to see class details and mentee progress.

userStories.title: Build Mentee Daily Calendar View
userStories.description: Create mobile-first daily view showing today's exercises with times.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Daily view as default for mentees

userStories.title: Build Mentee Weekly Calendar View
userStories.description: Create weekly view for mentees to see and plan the full week.

userStories.title: Build Exercise Time Setting UI
userStories.description: Create scroll wheel time picker for setting exercise times. Support bulk setting for the week.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Scroll wheel time picker (not drag-and-drop for time)
Bulk set time for whole week

userStories.title: Implement Appointment Shifting
userStories.description: Allow mentees to move exercises to different days via drag-and-drop.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Drag-and-drop to move exercise to different day
Option to update single occurrence or series

userStories.title: Display Weekly Topic and Monthly Schwerpunkt
userStories.description: Show current week's theme and monthly focus area explanations to mentees.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Weekly topic card at top of calendar

userStories.title: Build Exercise Execution View
userStories.description: Create the view shown when mentee executes an exercise - video/audio player with completion.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Skip explanation option for advanced users

userStories.title: Create Sessions Schema
userStories.description: Implement mentoringSessions table supporting both 1:1 and group sessions.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Status enum (scheduled, available, booked, completed, cancelled)

userStories.title: Build Mentor Availability Slots
userStories.description: Create availability slot management for 1:1 session booking.

userStories.title: Build Mentee Session Booking
userStories.description: Create booking flow for mentees to book available mentor slots.

acceptanceCriteria.text: View available slots in mentee app

userStories.title: Build Group Session Management
userStories.description: Create UI for mentors to create group sessions with RSVP.

userStories.title: Create Diary Entries Schema
userStories.description: Implement diaryEntries table supporting text and voice entries.

userStories.title: Build Mentee Diary Page
userStories.description: Create mobile-friendly diary interface for text and voice journaling.

userStories.title: Implement Voice Recording
userStories.description: Add voice recording with playback and waveform visualization.

userStories.title: Build Mentor Diary Access
userStories.description: Allow mentors to view diary entries of mentees in their classes.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Mentor can view class diary entries

userStories.title: Set Up Web Push Infrastructure
userStories.description: Configure Web Push API with VAPID keys and service worker.

userStories.title: Create Notification Preferences Schema
userStories.description: Implement notification preferences for exercise and session reminders.

userStories.title: Build Notification Settings Page
userStories.description: Create mentee settings page for configuring reminders.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Toggle switches for each reminder type

userStories.title: Implement Exercise Reminders with Tone
userStories.description: Send push notifications at scheduled times with configurable alarm tone.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Deep link to exercise on tap

userStories.title: Implement Session Reminders
userStories.description: Send push notifications before booked sessions.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Include session details and meeting link

userStories.title: Create AI Settings Infrastructure
userStories.description: Build settings system for AI configuration like Cerebro - admin can set provider/model/API keys.

userStories.title: Build AI Settings Admin Page
userStories.description: Create admin interface for configuring AI providers and API keys.

userStories.title: Implement Voice Transcription
userStories.description: Use configured AI provider to transcribe diary voice entries.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Transcribe audio using tenant's AI config

userStories.title: Implement Text Translation
userStories.description: Use AI to translate content between German and English.

userStories.title: Implement Context Generation
userStories.description: Use AI to auto-generate Herkunft and Ziel fields for curriculum content.

userStories.title: Build AI Prompts Configuration
userStories.description: Create admin interface for customizing AI prompts used throughout the system.

userStories.title: Create Measurements Schema
userStories.description: Implement measurements table for tracking mentee progress and patterns.

userStories.title: Build Pattern Tracking UI
userStories.description: Create interface for mentees to log emotional patterns by time blocks (e.g., stress tracking).

userStories.title: Implement Sentiment Analysis
userStories.description: Analyze diary entries for mood/mental health indicators using AI.

userStories.title: Build Weekly Summary Dashboard
userStories.description: Create dashboard showing weekly stats: exercise completion, emotional highlights, mood trends.

userStories.title: Build Mentor Analytics View
userStories.description: Create analytics dashboard for mentors to see aggregated mentee progress.
